channel.title: Weeklies on yffff's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Weeklies on yffff's blog

item.title: Weekly Issue 7
item.description:
The skillful toil and the wise worry, while the incapable seek nothing;
Fed and roaming freely, like an unmoored boat.
Why bother with worldly clouds? Better to rest and feast.

moss — Markdown Workspace.

GitHub - gunnargray-dev/unicode-animations — Unicode spinner animations as raw frame data. npx unicode-animations --web

GitHub - jgraph/drawio-mcp — draw.io MCP, providing multiple ways to connect with AI, e.g., directly: https://mcp.draw.io/mcp

Coding Plan Benchmark — Domestic Coding Plan evaluation. Coding Plan Comparison — Chinese AI Coding Plan comparison (GLM/MiniMax/Kimi/qwen, etc.).

GitHub - ztx888/HaloWebUI — OpenWebUI fork with Chinese interface for better Chinese user experience, added model billing and usage statistics.

GitHub - scipenai/tylax — Bi-directional converter between Typst and LaTeX. Available as CLI tool and Web interface.

GitHub - Jermic/awesome-aiart-pics-prompts — Web: https://aiart.pics/ — 3000+ Gemini Nano Banana Pro high-quality prompts and generated examples covering photography, design, art, marketing, etc. Bilingual support, JSON format.

Multiple Solutions to a Junior High Math Extremum Problem — Detailed explanation of Cauchy-Schwarz inequality, geometric method, function method for high school math maximum problems. Author saw this repeatedly on short videos and wrote this article.

Murfy, Free Online LaTeX Editor — AI LaTeX online editor, free tier is decent, better than Overleaf.

GitHub - stablyai/orca — An agent IDE.

GitHub - opendatalab/MinerU-Document-Explorer — MinerU’s knowledge base document Wiki tool with MCP support.

zhangmeishan.github.io/teaching.html — Large model course from a HIT professor.

GitHub - gsd-build/get-shit-done — Lightweight meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES. Also applicable to agents other than Claude Code.

iFixit: Free Repair Manuals — Free repair manuals, pretty interesting.

BuildCores: 3D PC Builder and Part Picker — Online PC building simulator, fun.

Hermes Agent — Agent similar to OpenClaw. hermes-agent/skills/creative/manim-video — Hermes launched manim Skill, letting AI create demonstration videos. Manim is the tool used by 3Blue1Brown for video production.

GitHub - Ataraxy-Labs/opensessions — tmux sidebar with agent status, git branches, and instant switching.

GitHub - alibaba/Logics-Parsing — Alibaba’s new OCR model.

Open-source screen recording tools:

  • GitHub - siddharthvaddem/openscreen — Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, free for commercial use. Alternative to Screen Studio.
  • Recordly — Open-source app for incredible screen recordings.

GitHub - Wangnov/uv-custom — Chinese mirror for uv and uv python runtime for high-speed downloads.

\[2604.02176\] Adam’s Law: Textual Frequency Law on Large Language Models — LLMs should pay more attention to higher-frequency expressions with the same meaning.

\[2604.04771\] MinerU2.5-Pro — MinerU’s new model pushing the limits of data-centric document parsing at scale.

David Noel Ng — Blog focusing on LLM mechanisms, AI safety & alignment, biophysics & hardware engineering. Summary: https://chatglm.cn/share/PF1kUqbD

GitHub - microsoft/VibeVoice — Microsoft’s open-source speech model, including TTS and ASR.

预训练经验 — Pre-training experience (Zhihu).

GitHub - whwangovo/pyre-code — Self-hosted ML coding practice platform. 68 problems from ReLU to flow matching — attention, training, RLHF, diffusion, and more. Similar to TorchCode mentioned earlier. Instant feedback in browser.

Helium Browser Update — Supports more compact appearance, vertical tabs, zen mode, Safari-like themes. Ready to fully switch to Helium, this is the browser I love.

Superconductor — Multi-Agent aggregation platform built purely in Rust.

GitHub - MiniMax-AI/cli — MiniMax CLI.

In-Place Test-Time Training — Automatically adjust some weights during testing. Neural Computers — Neural computers, quite interesting.

AlgoMaster Newsletter — Algorithm-focused newsletter. For example, LeetCode was HARD until I Learned these 15 Patterns summarizes 15 common LeetCode patterns: prefix sum, two pointers, sliding window, fast-slow pointers, etc.

git-star — GitHub repository ranking by star count, with various language and category rankings to see which projects are popular.

GitHub - casey/just — Command runner. Initially I wanted a Make alternative, asked AI and discovered this popular tool.

MiniMax Audio: Make Inspiration Sound Pleasant — MiniMax’s new music generation model.
item.content:encoded:
The skillful toil and the wise worry, while the incapable seek nothing;
Fed and roaming freely, like an unmoored boat.
Why bother with worldly clouds? Better to rest and feast.

moss — Markdown Workspace.

GitHub - gunnargray-dev/unicode-animations — Unicode spinner animations as raw frame data. npx unicode-animations --web

GitHub - jgraph/drawio-mcp — draw.io MCP, providing multiple ways to connect with AI, e.g., directly: https://mcp.draw.io/mcp

Coding Plan Benchmark — Domestic Coding Plan evaluation. Coding Plan Comparison — Chinese AI Coding Plan comparison (GLM/MiniMax/Kimi/qwen, etc.).

GitHub - ztx888/HaloWebUI — OpenWebUI fork with Chinese interface for better Chinese user experience, added model billing and usage statistics.

GitHub - scipenai/tylax — Bi-directional converter between Typst and LaTeX. Available as CLI tool and Web interface.

GitHub - Jermic/awesome-aiart-pics-prompts — Web: https://aiart.pics/ — 3000+ Gemini Nano Banana Pro high-quality prompts and generated examples covering photography, design, art, marketing, etc. Bilingual support, JSON format.

Multiple Solutions to a Junior High Math Extremum Problem — Detailed explanation of Cauchy-Schwarz inequality, geometric method, function method for high school math maximum problems. Author saw this repeatedly on short videos and wrote this article.

Murfy, Free Online LaTeX Editor — AI LaTeX online editor, free tier is decent, better than Overleaf.

GitHub - stablyai/orca — An agent IDE.

GitHub - opendatalab/MinerU-Document-Explorer — MinerU’s knowledge base document Wiki tool with MCP support.

zhangmeishan.github.io/teaching.html — Large model course from a HIT professor.

GitHub - gsd-build/get-shit-done — Lightweight meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES. Also applicable to agents other than Claude Code.

iFixit: Free Repair Manuals — Free repair manuals, pretty interesting.

BuildCores: 3D PC Builder and Part Picker — Online PC building simulator, fun.

Hermes Agent — Agent similar to OpenClaw. hermes-agent/skills/creative/manim-video — Hermes launched manim Skill, letting AI create demonstration videos. Manim is the tool used by 3Blue1Brown for video production.

GitHub - Ataraxy-Labs/opensessions — tmux sidebar with agent status, git branches, and instant switching.

GitHub - alibaba/Logics-Parsing — Alibaba’s new OCR model.

Open-source screen recording tools:

  • GitHub - siddharthvaddem/openscreen — Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, free for commercial use. Alternative to Screen Studio.
  • Recordly — Open-source app for incredible screen recordings.

GitHub - Wangnov/uv-custom — Chinese mirror for uv and uv python runtime for high-speed downloads.

\[2604.02176\] Adam’s Law: Textual Frequency Law on Large Language Models — LLMs should pay more attention to higher-frequency expressions with the same meaning.

\[2604.04771\] MinerU2.5-Pro — MinerU’s new model pushing the limits of data-centric document parsing at scale.

David Noel Ng — Blog focusing on LLM mechanisms, AI safety & alignment, biophysics & hardware engineering. Summary: https://chatglm.cn/share/PF1kUqbD

GitHub - microsoft/VibeVoice — Microsoft’s open-source speech model, including TTS and ASR.

预训练经验 — Pre-training experience (Zhihu).

GitHub - whwangovo/pyre-code — Self-hosted ML coding practice platform. 68 problems from ReLU to flow matching — attention, training, RLHF, diffusion, and more. Similar to TorchCode mentioned earlier. Instant feedback in browser.

Helium Browser Update — Supports more compact appearance, vertical tabs, zen mode, Safari-like themes. Ready to fully switch to Helium, this is the browser I love.

Superconductor — Multi-Agent aggregation platform built purely in Rust.

GitHub - MiniMax-AI/cli — MiniMax CLI.

In-Place Test-Time Training — Automatically adjust some weights during testing. Neural Computers — Neural computers, quite interesting.

AlgoMaster Newsletter — Algorithm-focused newsletter. For example, LeetCode was HARD until I Learned these 15 Patterns summarizes 15 common LeetCode patterns: prefix sum, two pointers, sliding window, fast-slow pointers, etc.

git-star — GitHub repository ranking by star count, with various language and category rankings to see which projects are popular.

GitHub - casey/just — Command runner. Initially I wanted a Make alternative, asked AI and discovered this popular tool.

MiniMax Audio: Make Inspiration Sound Pleasant — MiniMax’s new music generation model.

item.title: Weekly Issue 6
item.description:
OpenYak — Your Local AI Agent is another AI Agent aggregation platform with built-in MCPs and Skills, supporting IM integration.

Competition Discovery — Data science & AI competition aggregation platform. Subscribe to email for new competition notifications.

GitHub - hitmux/HitCC — Complete reverse-engineering documentation of Claude Code CLI Node.js version v2.1.84.

GitHub - ayaka-notes/overleaf-pro — Online LaTeX editor built on open-source Overleaf, supporting many closed-source features like Git integration.

GitHub - Yousa-Mirage/Tufted-Blog-Template — Tufte-style blog website template powered by Typst. Use Typst to create your personal website.

GitHub - iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI — Office CLI, the world’s first and best Office suite for AI agents. Free, open-source command-line tool for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Single binary, no Office installation required.

Zhipu and Qwen’s international sites are cleaner than domestic versions, currently not yet paid. Z.ai - Free AI Chatbot & Agent — Zhipu GLM international site with chat and agent modes. Agent mode can integrate into IM, currently supporting Feishu, WeChat, Telegram, and Discord. Qwen Chat — Alibaba Qwen international site.

  • LaTeX rendering plugin for terminal, suitable for Obsidian usage. GitHub - MaxwellsEquation/LaTerM-obsidian GitHub - MaxwellsEquation/LaTerM

GitHub - e10nMa2k/cc-mini — Another Claude Code implementation.

Metis — Curator Dashboard — Automatically discover new projects from GitHub trending and Product Hunt.

GitHub - zai-org/GLM-skills — Zhipu released GLM5v model along with open-sourced Skills.

GitHub - onyx-dot-app/onyx — Open Source AI Platform for AI Chat with advanced features, works with every LLM.

GitHub - AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm — All-in-one terminal workspace: local shells, SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, AI agent, and file manager in a single native binary. Built with Tauri 2 and pure Rust SSH (no OpenSSL). Smart reconnect, MCP, RAG, plugins, 30+ themes, 11 languages.

kexue.fm/archives/11693 — Brief introduction to median, describing how the mean is actually $\ell_{2}$ norm minimization while the median is $\ell_{1}$ norm minimization.

浅谈一下 World Model — About world models (sharp commentary edition).

Zread CLI — Zread CLI for analyzing local repositories using Zhipu coding subscription or your own API.

Lisette — Rust syntax, Go runtime

Slock - Where humans and AI agents collaborate
item.content:encoded:
OpenYak — Your Local AI Agent is another AI Agent aggregation platform with built-in MCPs and Skills, supporting IM integration.

Competition Discovery — Data science & AI competition aggregation platform. Subscribe to email for new competition notifications.

GitHub - hitmux/HitCC — Complete reverse-engineering documentation of Claude Code CLI Node.js version v2.1.84.

GitHub - ayaka-notes/overleaf-pro — Online LaTeX editor built on open-source Overleaf, supporting many closed-source features like Git integration.

GitHub - Yousa-Mirage/Tufted-Blog-Template — Tufte-style blog website template powered by Typst. Use Typst to create your personal website.

GitHub - iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI — Office CLI, the world’s first and best Office suite for AI agents. Free, open-source command-line tool for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Single binary, no Office installation required.

Zhipu and Qwen’s international sites are cleaner than domestic versions, currently not yet paid. Z.ai - Free AI Chatbot & Agent — Zhipu GLM international site with chat and agent modes. Agent mode can integrate into IM, currently supporting Feishu, WeChat, Telegram, and Discord. Qwen Chat — Alibaba Qwen international site.

  • LaTeX rendering plugin for terminal, suitable for Obsidian usage. GitHub - MaxwellsEquation/LaTerM-obsidian GitHub - MaxwellsEquation/LaTerM

GitHub - e10nMa2k/cc-mini — Another Claude Code implementation.

Metis — Curator Dashboard — Automatically discover new projects from GitHub trending and Product Hunt.

GitHub - zai-org/GLM-skills — Zhipu released GLM5v model along with open-sourced Skills.

GitHub - onyx-dot-app/onyx — Open Source AI Platform for AI Chat with advanced features, works with every LLM.

GitHub - AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm — All-in-one terminal workspace: local shells, SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, AI agent, and file manager in a single native binary. Built with Tauri 2 and pure Rust SSH (no OpenSSL). Smart reconnect, MCP, RAG, plugins, 30+ themes, 11 languages.

kexue.fm/archives/11693 — Brief introduction to median, describing how the mean is actually $\ell_{2}$ norm minimization while the median is $\ell_{1}$ norm minimization.

浅谈一下 World Model — About world models (sharp commentary edition).

Zread CLI — Zread CLI for analyzing local repositories using Zhipu coding subscription or your own API.

Lisette — Rust syntax, Go runtime

Slock - Where humans and AI agents collaborate

item.title: Weekly Issue 5
item.description:
This week’s focus: AI Coding Agents, developer toolchains, and high-quality technical reading.

AI Coding Agents

  • ccg-gateway: Gateway and configuration management for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI. Ideal for scenarios where providers are unreliable and frequent switching is needed.
  • Quotio: Command center for AI coding assistants.
  • Agents You Don’t Know: Principles, Architecture & Engineering Practice: An engineering-focused long-form article on Agents.
  • autoresearch: Automated research workflow exploration, suitable for closed-loop experimental tasks.
  • Harness Engineering — Maybe the Agent Isn’t the Model’s Problem: Emphasizes the decisive role of harness design in Agent usability.
  • Codex use cases: Official OpenAI Codex use case collection.
  • Understand large codebases: Practical advice for understanding and modifying large repositories.
  • Codex Plugins: Codex plugin system.
  • Claude Code Cheat Sheet: Quick reference for common commands.

Developer Tools

  • liteparse: Open-source document parser.
  • type4me: Open-source macOS Chinese voice input project supporting recognition and text optimization.
  • Zed text alignment update: Specific character alignment feature to improve code readability.
  • Stitch: Google’s AI design tool,偏向 Figma workflow.
  • storage.to: File-to-link sharing tool.
  • OpenCLI Hub: CLI tool directory.
  • GitWatt: Newly launched open-source project community.

Research & AI

  • MinerU-Diffusion (arXiv:2603.22458): Treating document OCR as an inverse rendering problem.
  • visual-attention-variants: Attention variants survey.
  • ml-visuals: Machine learning paper figure templates.
  • Neural-Network-Architecture-Diagrams: Neural network architecture diagram tool.

Infra & APIs

  • BlazeAPI: Free AI API Gateway (1000 requests/day quota, suitable for testing).
  • NetEase skills: Agent skills collection.
  • entropic: Open-source project to watch.

Math & Reading

  • How to express the solution to matrix equation AX+XB=C?: Covers vectorization to LU/QR/iterative methods, finally mentioning integral expressions.
  • Why is range left-closed right-open?: Language design detail discussion.
  • 5000-page Topology Textbook PDF: Massive reference material.

Life

  • HealthTick: macOS menu bar sedentary reminder tool.
  • Slay the Spire 2 Wiki: Game wiki site.

Agent Platform

  • Emdash: Multi coding agent parallel collaboration platform.
  • t3code: Coding agent aggregation platform.

Rendering

  • RaTeX: Rust-native KaTeX compatible rendering engine.
item.content:encoded:
This week’s focus: AI Coding Agents, developer toolchains, and high-quality technical reading.

AI Coding Agents

  • ccg-gateway: Gateway and configuration management for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI. Ideal for scenarios where providers are unreliable and frequent switching is needed.
  • Quotio: Command center for AI coding assistants.
  • Agents You Don’t Know: Principles, Architecture & Engineering Practice: An engineering-focused long-form article on Agents.
  • autoresearch: Automated research workflow exploration, suitable for closed-loop experimental tasks.
  • Harness Engineering — Maybe the Agent Isn’t the Model’s Problem: Emphasizes the decisive role of harness design in Agent usability.
  • Codex use cases: Official OpenAI Codex use case collection.
  • Understand large codebases: Practical advice for understanding and modifying large repositories.
  • Codex Plugins: Codex plugin system.
  • Claude Code Cheat Sheet: Quick reference for common commands.

Developer Tools

  • liteparse: Open-source document parser.
  • type4me: Open-source macOS Chinese voice input project supporting recognition and text optimization.
  • Zed text alignment update: Specific character alignment feature to improve code readability.
  • Stitch: Google’s AI design tool,偏向 Figma workflow.
  • storage.to: File-to-link sharing tool.
  • OpenCLI Hub: CLI tool directory.
  • GitWatt: Newly launched open-source project community.

Research & AI

  • MinerU-Diffusion (arXiv:2603.22458): Treating document OCR as an inverse rendering problem.
  • visual-attention-variants: Attention variants survey.
  • ml-visuals: Machine learning paper figure templates.
  • Neural-Network-Architecture-Diagrams: Neural network architecture diagram tool.

Infra & APIs

  • BlazeAPI: Free AI API Gateway (1000 requests/day quota, suitable for testing).
  • NetEase skills: Agent skills collection.
  • entropic: Open-source project to watch.

Math & Reading

  • How to express the solution to matrix equation AX+XB=C?: Covers vectorization to LU/QR/iterative methods, finally mentioning integral expressions.
  • Why is range left-closed right-open?: Language design detail discussion.
  • 5000-page Topology Textbook PDF: Massive reference material.

Life

  • HealthTick: macOS menu bar sedentary reminder tool.
  • Slay the Spire 2 Wiki: Game wiki site.

Agent Platform

  • Emdash: Multi coding agent parallel collaboration platform.
  • t3code: Coding agent aggregation platform.

Rendering

  • RaTeX: Rust-native KaTeX compatible rendering engine.

item.title: Weekly Issue 4
item.description:
Goal-Driven

goal-driven/readme_cn.md — An AI agent framework that achieves complex tasks through goal decomposition and execution.

CLI Tools

GitHub - jackwener/opencli — Uses playwright MCP to extract web information, turning any website into a CLI.

GitHub - LeoYeAI/openclaw-master-skills — Collection of 339+ high-quality OpenClaw skills covering AI, development, productivity, marketing, etc.

npx tokscale@latest — View local agent usage and track token consumption.

rtk — Make your AI coding agent smarter — Filter terminal output to save tokens and improve AI coding efficiency.

vPhone Virtual Phone

GitHub - 34306/vphone-aio — One-click script to run virtual phone environment. GitHub - Lakr233/vphone-cli — CLI version of virtual phone tool.

Design Tools

GitHub - open-pencil/open-pencil — AI-native design editor, open-source Figma alternative. Ardot — Tencent’s online collaborative design tool, Figma-like experience.

AI News & Information

何夕2077’s AI News — Curated AI news and tools, stay updated on AI frontier. AI资讯速览 — AI news at a glance. imjuya.github.io/juya-ai-daily/ — Daily AI news summary. linux.do AI Tech Daily — Linux.do forum’s AI tech daily.

Learning Resources

Operating System Principles (Spring 2026) — Nanjing University’s OS course (the professor is quite entertaining).

LLM Cookbook — LLM practical cookbook for systematic learning of large language models. 100 Papers with Code – Learning Note — Learning notes for 100 classic AI papers. The author has also updated 10 papers so far.

MicroGPT explained interactively — Interactive understanding of MicroGPT architecture. ScalingOpt - Optimization at Scale — Large-scale optimization research community.

LLM Architecture Gallery — Sebastian Raschka’s LLM architecture gallery with illustrated explanations of various model structures.

Privacy Search

SearXNG instances — Public SearXNG instance collection, self-hosted search engines.

Screen Recording

Recordly — Open-source screen recording software with high-quality recording support.

PDF Processing

GitHub - opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf — PDF parser that makes PDF data usable for AI.

AI Service Orchestration

Lody — AI CLI service aggregation platform via ACP protocol, supporting multi-device sync. Alma - Elegant AI Provider Orchestration — Elegant AI provider orchestration tool.

Subtitles & Translation

GitHub - buxuku/SmartSub — “妙幕” cross-platform subtitle tool supporting batch subtitle generation and translation (Baidu, Volcano, OpenAI, Ollama, DeepSeek, etc.). Bob — Clean and efficient translation tool. GitHub - pot-app/pot-desktop — Cross-platform hover translation and OCR software.

Key Display

Tools for displaying key operations during screen recording:

  • Keyviz — Open-source free with smooth animations and high customizability
  • KeyCastOW — Classic lightweight tool focused on stable and clear key display
  • Kling — Lightweight without ads, clean interface, easy to use
  • KeyCastr — Classic open-source choice for macOS users with customizable display
  • Key Display — Chrome extension for in-browser key display
  • Keylume — macOS virtual keyboard display for screen recording demos

Model Run Checking

CanIRun.ai — Check which models your machine can run. GitHub - AlexsJones/llmfit — CLI version, one command to find hardware-compatible models.

Academic Writing

Academic Phrasebank — University of Manchester’s collection of academic writing phrases. Let AI learn then write your own papers.

PPT Generation

GitHub - hugohe3/ppt-master — AI generates beautiful PPT from documents, 15 examples, 229 pages.

Skill Management

macOS only, though npx skills is probably better:

  • GitHub - Shpigford/chops — Browse, edit, manage Claude Code, Cursor, Codex skills.
  • GitHub - tddworks/SkillsManager — Discover and install AI coding assistant skills.

CLI to API

Wrap CLI tools into API services:

  • GitHub - router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI — Wrap Gemini CLI, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code into OpenAI/Gemini/Claude-compatible APIs.
  • GitHub - lieeew/sub2api — One-stop open-source relay service, unify Claude, OpenAI, Gemini access, support shared pooling.
item.content:encoded:
Goal-Driven

goal-driven/readme_cn.md — An AI agent framework that achieves complex tasks through goal decomposition and execution.

CLI Tools

GitHub - jackwener/opencli — Uses playwright MCP to extract web information, turning any website into a CLI.

GitHub - LeoYeAI/openclaw-master-skills — Collection of 339+ high-quality OpenClaw skills covering AI, development, productivity, marketing, etc.

npx tokscale@latest — View local agent usage and track token consumption.

rtk — Make your AI coding agent smarter — Filter terminal output to save tokens and improve AI coding efficiency.

vPhone Virtual Phone

GitHub - 34306/vphone-aio — One-click script to run virtual phone environment. GitHub - Lakr233/vphone-cli — CLI version of virtual phone tool.

Design Tools

GitHub - open-pencil/open-pencil — AI-native design editor, open-source Figma alternative. Ardot — Tencent’s online collaborative design tool, Figma-like experience.

AI News & Information

何夕2077’s AI News — Curated AI news and tools, stay updated on AI frontier. AI资讯速览 — AI news at a glance. imjuya.github.io/juya-ai-daily/ — Daily AI news summary. linux.do AI Tech Daily — Linux.do forum’s AI tech daily.

Learning Resources

Operating System Principles (Spring 2026) — Nanjing University’s OS course (the professor is quite entertaining).

LLM Cookbook — LLM practical cookbook for systematic learning of large language models. 100 Papers with Code – Learning Note — Learning notes for 100 classic AI papers. The author has also updated 10 papers so far.

MicroGPT explained interactively — Interactive understanding of MicroGPT architecture. ScalingOpt - Optimization at Scale — Large-scale optimization research community.

LLM Architecture Gallery — Sebastian Raschka’s LLM architecture gallery with illustrated explanations of various model structures.

Privacy Search

SearXNG instances — Public SearXNG instance collection, self-hosted search engines.

Screen Recording

Recordly — Open-source screen recording software with high-quality recording support.

PDF Processing

GitHub - opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf — PDF parser that makes PDF data usable for AI.

AI Service Orchestration

Lody — AI CLI service aggregation platform via ACP protocol, supporting multi-device sync. Alma - Elegant AI Provider Orchestration — Elegant AI provider orchestration tool.

Subtitles & Translation

GitHub - buxuku/SmartSub — “妙幕” cross-platform subtitle tool supporting batch subtitle generation and translation (Baidu, Volcano, OpenAI, Ollama, DeepSeek, etc.). Bob — Clean and efficient translation tool. GitHub - pot-app/pot-desktop — Cross-platform hover translation and OCR software.

Key Display

Tools for displaying key operations during screen recording:

  • Keyviz — Open-source free with smooth animations and high customizability
  • KeyCastOW — Classic lightweight tool focused on stable and clear key display
  • Kling — Lightweight without ads, clean interface, easy to use
  • KeyCastr — Classic open-source choice for macOS users with customizable display
  • Key Display — Chrome extension for in-browser key display
  • Keylume — macOS virtual keyboard display for screen recording demos

Model Run Checking

CanIRun.ai — Check which models your machine can run. GitHub - AlexsJones/llmfit — CLI version, one command to find hardware-compatible models.

Academic Writing

Academic Phrasebank — University of Manchester’s collection of academic writing phrases. Let AI learn then write your own papers.

PPT Generation

GitHub - hugohe3/ppt-master — AI generates beautiful PPT from documents, 15 examples, 229 pages.

Skill Management

macOS only, though npx skills is probably better:

  • GitHub - Shpigford/chops — Browse, edit, manage Claude Code, Cursor, Codex skills.
  • GitHub - tddworks/SkillsManager — Discover and install AI coding assistant skills.

CLI to API

Wrap CLI tools into API services:

  • GitHub - router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI — Wrap Gemini CLI, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code into OpenAI/Gemini/Claude-compatible APIs.
  • GitHub - lieeew/sub2api — One-stop open-source relay service, unify Claude, OpenAI, Gemini access, support shared pooling.

item.title: Weekly Issue 3
item.description:
AI Models & Inference

  • arxiv-daily-researcher — Daily ArXiv paper digest推送, supporting multiple journals.
  • aha — High-performance AI model inference library in Rust, supporting mainstream vision and language models.
  • llm-from-scratch — CS336 course assignment implementation to understand LLM training principles.
  • AutoClaw — Zhipu’s OpenClaw wrapper application, integrated into IM for AI workspace.

Academic & Research Tools

  • alphaxiv-paper-lookup — Official alphaxiv Skill for快速获取 structured paper data.
  • aminer-open-skill — Zhipu Aminer’s official Skill for paper and scholar lookup (includes 38.8 free credits).
  • BERTopic — Transformer-based topic modeling tool with semantic understanding and automatic topic discovery.
  • markdown-tex — Bidirectional Markdown ↔ LaTeX conversion library using AST as intermediate.

Claude Code Skills & Tools

  • skills.sh — Vercel’s official Skill directory, supports npx skills add one-click install, recommended as first choice.
  • Find awesome Agent Skills — Curated Agent Skills discovery platform.
  • awesome-claude-skills — Community-curated Claude Skills list.
  • SkillHub — Claude Skills marketplace.
  • Tencent SkillHub — Tencent’s Skills community, optimized for Chinese users.
  • claude-health — Claude Code project health check Skill by Tw92.
  • CCometixLine — Rust-based Claude Code status bar tool.
  • MATLAB Skills / MATLAB MCP — MATLAB’s official MCP Server and Skills collection.
  • Learn Claude Code — Tutorial on building a Claude Code-like Agent from scratch, adding one mechanism at a time.
  • PaddleOCR Skills — Official PaddleOCR Skill for OCR text recognition (10k pages/day quota).

Code Repository Intelligent Analysis

  • Code Wiki — AI-driven code repository Wiki generator.
  • DeepWiki — Conversational AI documentation for any code repository.
  • Zread — AI code reading assistant that generates repository knowledge graphs.
  • GitNexus — Browser-based code knowledge graph generator with Graph RAG exploration.
  • Alibaba’s Qoder also has repository Wiki features.

Development Tools

  • Bruno — Open-source API testing IDE, lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia.
  • Yaak — Intuitive desktop API client supporting REST/GraphQL/WebSocket/gRPC.
  • BrowserOS — Open-source Agentic browser, alternative to ChatGPT Atlas/Perplexity Comet.
  • Hello Claw — Datawhale’s OpenClaw guide covering principles and implementation.

Web Content Extraction

  • defuddle / Online version — Obsidian CEO’s web-to-Markdown tool, already built into official web clipper plugin. Drag to bookmark bar for quick抓取 and copy.
  • markdown.new — Cloudflare-powered URL to Markdown service.
  • pure.md — Global cache service between LLMs and web pages (paid).
  • Jina Reader — Add r.jina.ai/ before URL to extract content.
  • create360.ai — Similar to Jina Reader for web content extraction.
  • agent-fetch — Web scraping tool optimized for Agents.

Utilities

  • Container Image Monitoring — Docker image accelerator node status monitoring.
  • 轩辕镜像 — Efficient and stable Docker image pulling service.
  • Thaw — macOS menu bar management tool, successor to Ice.
  • delphitools — Collection of实用小 tools: unit conversion, symbolic computation, PDF/text processing, etc.
  • terraink — Map poster generator for creating unique customizable cartographic posters.
  • Slidev — Web-based developer presentation tool with CLI and AI Skill support.
  • snowshot / better-shot — Screenshot beautification tools.
  • ekphos — Terminal-based Markdown research tool, inspired by Obsidian.

Learning Resources & Visualization

  • Sorting algorithms — Simon Willison’s interactive sorting algorithm visualization.
  • Principles of Sensing for Autonomy — Stanford course on autonomy system sensing principles.

Fun Projects

  • WorldEnd.ai — AI-generated end-of-the-world scenarios.

macOS Tip: Skim Highlight Shortcut

Add instant highlight functionality to Skim PDF reader, simulating Sumatra PDF’s a key experience:

tell application "Skim"
 activate
 tell document 1
 set theSel to (get selection)
 set theNote to make note with data theSel with properties {type:highlight note, color:deep pink}
 end tell
end tell

Save to /Users/username/Library/Application Support/Skim/Scripts/highlight.scpt, then in System Settings > Keyboard > Keyboard Shortcuts > App Shortcuts, add Ctrl+A shortcut for Skim.

Note: When using OrbStack instead of Docker Desktop on Mac, it’s recommended to add image accelerator configuration directly in OrbStack settings rather than ~/.docker/daemon.json. Can also be configured in ~/.orbstack/config/docker.json.
item.content:encoded:
AI Models & Inference

  • arxiv-daily-researcher — Daily ArXiv paper digest推送, supporting multiple journals.
  • aha — High-performance AI model inference library in Rust, supporting mainstream vision and language models.
  • llm-from-scratch — CS336 course assignment implementation to understand LLM training principles.
  • AutoClaw — Zhipu’s OpenClaw wrapper application, integrated into IM for AI workspace.

Academic & Research Tools

  • alphaxiv-paper-lookup — Official alphaxiv Skill for快速获取 structured paper data.
  • aminer-open-skill — Zhipu Aminer’s official Skill for paper and scholar lookup (includes 38.8 free credits).
  • BERTopic — Transformer-based topic modeling tool with semantic understanding and automatic topic discovery.
  • markdown-tex — Bidirectional Markdown ↔ LaTeX conversion library using AST as intermediate.

Claude Code Skills & Tools

  • skills.sh — Vercel’s official Skill directory, supports npx skills add one-click install, recommended as first choice.
  • Find awesome Agent Skills — Curated Agent Skills discovery platform.
  • awesome-claude-skills — Community-curated Claude Skills list.
  • SkillHub — Claude Skills marketplace.
  • Tencent SkillHub — Tencent’s Skills community, optimized for Chinese users.
  • claude-health — Claude Code project health check Skill by Tw92.
  • CCometixLine — Rust-based Claude Code status bar tool.
  • MATLAB Skills / MATLAB MCP — MATLAB’s official MCP Server and Skills collection.
  • Learn Claude Code — Tutorial on building a Claude Code-like Agent from scratch, adding one mechanism at a time.
  • PaddleOCR Skills — Official PaddleOCR Skill for OCR text recognition (10k pages/day quota).

Code Repository Intelligent Analysis

  • Code Wiki — AI-driven code repository Wiki generator.
  • DeepWiki — Conversational AI documentation for any code repository.
  • Zread — AI code reading assistant that generates repository knowledge graphs.
  • GitNexus — Browser-based code knowledge graph generator with Graph RAG exploration.
  • Alibaba’s Qoder also has repository Wiki features.

Development Tools

  • Bruno — Open-source API testing IDE, lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia.
  • Yaak — Intuitive desktop API client supporting REST/GraphQL/WebSocket/gRPC.
  • BrowserOS — Open-source Agentic browser, alternative to ChatGPT Atlas/Perplexity Comet.
  • Hello Claw — Datawhale’s OpenClaw guide covering principles and implementation.

Web Content Extraction

  • defuddle / Online version — Obsidian CEO’s web-to-Markdown tool, already built into official web clipper plugin. Drag to bookmark bar for quick抓取 and copy.
  • markdown.new — Cloudflare-powered URL to Markdown service.
  • pure.md — Global cache service between LLMs and web pages (paid).
  • Jina Reader — Add r.jina.ai/ before URL to extract content.
  • create360.ai — Similar to Jina Reader for web content extraction.
  • agent-fetch — Web scraping tool optimized for Agents.

Utilities

  • Container Image Monitoring — Docker image accelerator node status monitoring.
  • 轩辕镜像 — Efficient and stable Docker image pulling service.
  • Thaw — macOS menu bar management tool, successor to Ice.
  • delphitools — Collection of实用小 tools: unit conversion, symbolic computation, PDF/text processing, etc.
  • terraink — Map poster generator for creating unique customizable cartographic posters.
  • Slidev — Web-based developer presentation tool with CLI and AI Skill support.
  • snowshot / better-shot — Screenshot beautification tools.
  • ekphos — Terminal-based Markdown research tool, inspired by Obsidian.

Learning Resources & Visualization

  • Sorting algorithms — Simon Willison’s interactive sorting algorithm visualization.
  • Principles of Sensing for Autonomy — Stanford course on autonomy system sensing principles.

Fun Projects

  • WorldEnd.ai — AI-generated end-of-the-world scenarios.

macOS Tip: Skim Highlight Shortcut

Add instant highlight functionality to Skim PDF reader, simulating Sumatra PDF’s a key experience:

tell application "Skim"
    activate
    tell document 1
        set theSel to (get selection)
        set theNote to make note with data theSel with properties {type:highlight note, color:deep pink}
    end tell
end tell

Save to /Users/username/Library/Application Support/Skim/Scripts/highlight.scpt, then in System Settings > Keyboard > Keyboard Shortcuts > App Shortcuts, add Ctrl+A shortcut for Skim.

Note: When using OrbStack instead of Docker Desktop on Mac, it’s recommended to add image accelerator configuration directly in OrbStack settings rather than ~/.docker/daemon.json. Can also be configured in ~/.orbstack/config/docker.json.

item.title: Weekly Issue 2
item.description:
AI Projects & Models

WiFi DensePose → RuView

  • GitHub - ruvnet/wifi-densepose

Transforms WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital signs monitoring, and presence detection — without any camera. By analyzing Channel State Information (CSI) perturbations, combining signal processing and machine learning to reconstruct human poses, breathing rate, and heartbeat.

💡 Observation: This project suddenly exploded to 15k stars. After reading an analysis on Juejin, I realized it was mainly vibe-coded. Now renamed to RuView, with a beautifully crafted README (likely all written by Claude Code). In the AI era, we need to improve our discernment and think more independently.

ACE Music

  • acemusic.ai

StepFun’s music generation model.

Development Tools & Platforms

Obsidian CLI Support

Note-taking app Obsidian new version supports CLI, making it more convenient for Agent-based note management. Also supports drag-and-drop image resizing from the bottom-right corner, no longer needing third-party plugins.

TorchCode

  • GitHub - duoan/TorchCode

PyTorch version of LeetCode — practice implementing softmax, attention, GPT-2, etc. from scratch with instant auto-grading. Based on Jupyter, self-hostable or use online.

Agent Skill Tool Ecosystem

Tool Agent Count Features
Vercel Skills / add-skill 20+ Official ecosystem, most stable
empjs/skill (eskill) 13+ Unified storage, symlink distribution
Skillkit 32+ Built-in 15,000+ skills
agent-skills-cli 42+ Most compatible
skill-linker - Lightweight CLI with TUI
agent-skills-hub 18+ Python ecosystem, cross-platform

Universal install: npx <tool> add <skill-repo> --all --global

AI-digest

  • GitHub - jackwener/AI-digest

Automatically summarizes your Agent usage today.

Readout

  • readout.org

Agent development environment dashboard.

Documentation & Academic Tools

SJTU TeX

  • GitHub - sjtug/SJTUTeX

Shanghai Jiao Tong University’s LaTeX template, including dissertation, article, and presentation templates with many clever effects. Useful as reference for LaTeX template creation, or remove SJTU elements to make your own template.

AI Paper Briefing

  • ai-brief.liziran.com

Daily curated paper selections with RSS subscription support.

Somark

  • somark.tech

Document intelligence engine, another OCR platform like Doc2x and MinerU with good results.

Creative Tools & Visualization

Now I Get It!

  • nowigetit.us

Paper2Galgame

  • paper2gal.top

AI paper reader that transforms papers into visual novels.

Deep Reading & Learning Resources

Neural Scaling Laws Trilogy

  • Yizhou Liu’s Blog

Trilogy on scaling laws for representations, transformations, and training.

msgsxj’s Blog Archive

  • msgsxj.cn/archives

Technical blog focusing on machine learning, statistical learning, and optimization algorithms, with 33 technical posts. Several good articles, though hasn’t been updated for a few years.

Matrix Computation Courses

  • Advanced Large-Scale Matrix Computation Tutorial
  • Matrix Computation (ECNU)
item.content:encoded:
AI Projects & Models

WiFi DensePose → RuView

  • GitHub - ruvnet/wifi-densepose

Transforms WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital signs monitoring, and presence detection — without any camera. By analyzing Channel State Information (CSI) perturbations, combining signal processing and machine learning to reconstruct human poses, breathing rate, and heartbeat.

💡 Observation: This project suddenly exploded to 15k stars. After reading an analysis on Juejin, I realized it was mainly vibe-coded. Now renamed to RuView, with a beautifully crafted README (likely all written by Claude Code). In the AI era, we need to improve our discernment and think more independently.

ACE Music

  • acemusic.ai

StepFun’s music generation model.

Development Tools & Platforms

Obsidian CLI Support

Note-taking app Obsidian new version supports CLI, making it more convenient for Agent-based note management. Also supports drag-and-drop image resizing from the bottom-right corner, no longer needing third-party plugins.

TorchCode

  • GitHub - duoan/TorchCode

PyTorch version of LeetCode — practice implementing softmax, attention, GPT-2, etc. from scratch with instant auto-grading. Based on Jupyter, self-hostable or use online.

Agent Skill Tool Ecosystem

Tool Agent Count Features
Vercel Skills / add-skill 20+ Official ecosystem, most stable
empjs/skill (eskill) 13+ Unified storage, symlink distribution
Skillkit 32+ Built-in 15,000+ skills
agent-skills-cli 42+ Most compatible
skill-linker - Lightweight CLI with TUI
agent-skills-hub 18+ Python ecosystem, cross-platform

Universal install: npx <tool> add <skill-repo> --all --global

AI-digest

  • GitHub - jackwener/AI-digest

Automatically summarizes your Agent usage today.

Readout

  • readout.org

Agent development environment dashboard.

Documentation & Academic Tools

SJTU TeX

  • GitHub - sjtug/SJTUTeX

Shanghai Jiao Tong University’s LaTeX template, including dissertation, article, and presentation templates with many clever effects. Useful as reference for LaTeX template creation, or remove SJTU elements to make your own template.

AI Paper Briefing

  • ai-brief.liziran.com

Daily curated paper selections with RSS subscription support.

Somark

  • somark.tech

Document intelligence engine, another OCR platform like Doc2x and MinerU with good results.

Creative Tools & Visualization

Now I Get It!

  • nowigetit.us

Paper2Galgame

  • paper2gal.top

AI paper reader that transforms papers into visual novels.

Deep Reading & Learning Resources

Neural Scaling Laws Trilogy

  • Yizhou Liu’s Blog

Trilogy on scaling laws for representations, transformations, and training.

msgsxj’s Blog Archive

  • msgsxj.cn/archives

Technical blog focusing on machine learning, statistical learning, and optimization algorithms, with 33 technical posts. Several good articles, though hasn’t been updated for a few years.

Matrix Computation Courses

  • Advanced Large-Scale Matrix Computation Tutorial
  • Matrix Computation (ECNU)

item.title: Weekly Issue 1
item.description:
The first weekly issue, published roughly every two weeks. AI was used for categorization, though not perfectly accurate — I decided against manual sorting.

AI & Machine Learning

Models & Frameworks

  • xAI released Grok 4.2, with four Agents working simultaneously and strong search capabilities.
  • Gemini 3.1 Pro: Announcing our latest Gemini AI model — Gemini 3.1 Pro is here!
  • GitHub - fishaudio/fish-speech: SOTA Open Source TTS — Text-to-speech and voice cloning.
  • GitHub - stepfun-ai/NextStep-1 — StepFun’s autoregressive image generation model with continuous tokens (ICLR 2026 Oral).

Papers & Research

  • GitHub - MaximeVandegar/Papers-in-100-Lines-of-Code — Implementing classic AI papers in ~100 lines of code.
  • Understanding Anthropic’s Interpretability Research — A nice overview of Anthropic’s interpretability work.
  • On Surprising Effectiveness of Masking Updates in Adaptive Optimizers — A new optimizer: Momentum-aligned gradient masking (Magma).
  • GitHub - ResearAI/AutoFigure-Edit — AutoFigure: Generating publication-ready scientific illustrations (ICLR 2026).

AI Hardware

  • Taalas | The model is The Computer — Another AI inference chip company.
    • Ultra-fast HC1 chip achieving ~17k token/s inference on LLAMA 3.1 8B.
    • Try it: chat jimmy

AI Agents & Tools

  • LobsterAI — NetEase’s open-source AI Agent client.
  • GitHub - RightNow-AI/openfang — An Agent OS similar to OpenClaw.
  • GitHub - 1rgs/nanocode — Minimal Claude Code alternative in a single Python file (~250 lines, zero dependencies).
  • GitHub - minorcell/memo-code — Lightweight coding agent for terminal. Blog post discusses terminal input challenges.
  • Happy - Claude Code Mobile Client — Remote-control Claude Code on mobile (though not the most user-friendly).
  • GitHub - Panniantong/Agent-Reach — Let AI agents access social media and streaming platforms (Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, etc.).

Development Tools

IDEs & Editors

  • GitHub - GCWing/BitFun — Agentic Development Environment with four modes: Agentic, Plan, Debug, Review.
  • Markdown Now — Rust + GPUI-based markdown editor for macOS (early stage).
  • {clarity} — Online editor supporting LaTeX and Typst.

Terminals

  • Three terminals with vertical tab support:
    • ghostree — Worktree-Aware Terminal for Ghostty
    • cmux — Terminal built for multitasking
    • Supacode

Utilities

  • GitHub - debugtheworldbot/keyStats — Keyboard & mouse usage analytics app (macOS/Windows).
  • GitHub - caomengxuan666/WinuxCmd — Linux commands for Windows (900KB only).
  • GitHub - xxnuo/MTranServer — Offline translation server with low resource usage.
  • GitHub - tonyantony300/alt-sendme — Cross-platform file transfer without cloud storage.

Web & Browser

Web Services

  • Mockdown — Free ASCII wireframe editor for quick UI prototyping.
  • Scour — Semantic content aggregator mining “hidden gems” from HN, Reddit, arXiv, and thousands of blogs. Supports RSS.
  • LazySo — Remove watermarks from AI-generated images (Gemini, NotebookLM, Doubao, etc.).
  • markdown.new — Cloudflare-powered URL to Markdown converter.
  • Wispbyte — Free 24/7 hosting.
  • Reactive Resume — Free open-source resume builder.
  • Trendshift — Discover trending open-source projects and developers.
  • Presearch — Decentralized search engine with NSFW mode.

RSS & News

  • GitHub - WCY-dt/MrRSS — Modern cross-platform AI RSS reader with Vim-like shortcuts.
  • GitHub - IronsideXXVI/Hacker-News — Native macOS HN client in SwiftUI.

Research & Learning

Educational Resources

  • Comprehensive AI/LLM Guide — Accessible overview of neural networks, LLM inference/training, GPU infrastructure, and Agent usage.
  • CS146S: The Modern Software Developer — Stanford course on modern software development with LLM coding.
  • Master the Math — Guide to rigorous mathematics of AI/ML/Data Science.

Research Tools

  • ArxivLens — Search across ArXiv, PubMed, BioRxiv, MedRxiv.
  • GitHub - bienz2/BibChecker — Check bibliography formatting (IEEE/ACM) without AI.
  • GitHub - karakeep-app/karakeep — Self-hostable bookmark-everything app with AI tagging and full-text search.

Mathematics & Algorithms

  • 3Blue1Brown Linear Algebra Notes — English and Persian notes covering key concepts.
  • Elevator Scheduling Algorithms — Clear explanation of elevator/disk scheduling algorithms.
  • Gaussian Mixture Models — Probabilistic model for clustering, density estimation, and anomaly detection.

Design & Media

Design Tools

  • Framer China — Free Framer templates, components, and tutorials (2026).
  • GitHub - lukilabs/beautiful-mermaid — Render Mermaid diagrams as SVG and ASCII art. By Craft team (who also built Craft Agent).
  • GitHub - BIT-DataLab/Edit-Banana — Convert AI-generated images to editable content for PPT/draw.io.

Emerging Technologies

Wireless & Communications

  • Stacked Intelligent Metasurfaces — Stacking multiple RIS (Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces) for light-speed processing, enabling faster communication and sensing. Key author: Jiancheng An. WeChat article (Chinese).

Novel Concepts

  • Frequency-as-Aperture (FaA) — Achieves virtual aperture through frequency variation, adding another degree of freedom beyond physical sensor spacing.
item.content:encoded:
The first weekly issue, published roughly every two weeks. AI was used for categorization, though not perfectly accurate — I decided against manual sorting.

AI & Machine Learning

Models & Frameworks

  • xAI released Grok 4.2, with four Agents working simultaneously and strong search capabilities.
  • Gemini 3.1 Pro: Announcing our latest Gemini AI model — Gemini 3.1 Pro is here!
  • GitHub - fishaudio/fish-speech: SOTA Open Source TTS — Text-to-speech and voice cloning.
  • GitHub - stepfun-ai/NextStep-1 — StepFun’s autoregressive image generation model with continuous tokens (ICLR 2026 Oral).

Papers & Research

  • GitHub - MaximeVandegar/Papers-in-100-Lines-of-Code — Implementing classic AI papers in ~100 lines of code.
  • Understanding Anthropic’s Interpretability Research — A nice overview of Anthropic’s interpretability work.
  • On Surprising Effectiveness of Masking Updates in Adaptive Optimizers — A new optimizer: Momentum-aligned gradient masking (Magma).
  • GitHub - ResearAI/AutoFigure-Edit — AutoFigure: Generating publication-ready scientific illustrations (ICLR 2026).

AI Hardware

  • Taalas | The model is The Computer — Another AI inference chip company.
    • Ultra-fast HC1 chip achieving ~17k token/s inference on LLAMA 3.1 8B.
    • Try it: chat jimmy

AI Agents & Tools

  • LobsterAI — NetEase’s open-source AI Agent client.
  • GitHub - RightNow-AI/openfang — An Agent OS similar to OpenClaw.
  • GitHub - 1rgs/nanocode — Minimal Claude Code alternative in a single Python file (~250 lines, zero dependencies).
  • GitHub - minorcell/memo-code — Lightweight coding agent for terminal. Blog post discusses terminal input challenges.
  • Happy - Claude Code Mobile Client — Remote-control Claude Code on mobile (though not the most user-friendly).
  • GitHub - Panniantong/Agent-Reach — Let AI agents access social media and streaming platforms (Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, etc.).

Development Tools

IDEs & Editors

  • GitHub - GCWing/BitFun — Agentic Development Environment with four modes: Agentic, Plan, Debug, Review.
  • Markdown Now — Rust + GPUI-based markdown editor for macOS (early stage).
  • {clarity} — Online editor supporting LaTeX and Typst.

Terminals

  • Three terminals with vertical tab support:
    • ghostree — Worktree-Aware Terminal for Ghostty
    • cmux — Terminal built for multitasking
    • Supacode

Utilities

  • GitHub - debugtheworldbot/keyStats — Keyboard & mouse usage analytics app (macOS/Windows).
  • GitHub - caomengxuan666/WinuxCmd — Linux commands for Windows (900KB only).
  • GitHub - xxnuo/MTranServer — Offline translation server with low resource usage.
  • GitHub - tonyantony300/alt-sendme — Cross-platform file transfer without cloud storage.

Web & Browser

Web Services

  • Mockdown — Free ASCII wireframe editor for quick UI prototyping.
  • Scour — Semantic content aggregator mining “hidden gems” from HN, Reddit, arXiv, and thousands of blogs. Supports RSS.
  • LazySo — Remove watermarks from AI-generated images (Gemini, NotebookLM, Doubao, etc.).
  • markdown.new — Cloudflare-powered URL to Markdown converter.
  • Wispbyte — Free 24/7 hosting.
  • Reactive Resume — Free open-source resume builder.
  • Trendshift — Discover trending open-source projects and developers.
  • Presearch — Decentralized search engine with NSFW mode.

RSS & News

  • GitHub - WCY-dt/MrRSS — Modern cross-platform AI RSS reader with Vim-like shortcuts.
  • GitHub - IronsideXXVI/Hacker-News — Native macOS HN client in SwiftUI.

Research & Learning

Educational Resources

  • Comprehensive AI/LLM Guide — Accessible overview of neural networks, LLM inference/training, GPU infrastructure, and Agent usage.
  • CS146S: The Modern Software Developer — Stanford course on modern software development with LLM coding.
  • Master the Math — Guide to rigorous mathematics of AI/ML/Data Science.

Research Tools

  • ArxivLens — Search across ArXiv, PubMed, BioRxiv, MedRxiv.
  • GitHub - bienz2/BibChecker — Check bibliography formatting (IEEE/ACM) without AI.
  • GitHub - karakeep-app/karakeep — Self-hostable bookmark-everything app with AI tagging and full-text search.

Mathematics & Algorithms

  • 3Blue1Brown Linear Algebra Notes — English and Persian notes covering key concepts.
  • Elevator Scheduling Algorithms — Clear explanation of elevator/disk scheduling algorithms.
  • Gaussian Mixture Models — Probabilistic model for clustering, density estimation, and anomaly detection.

Design & Media

Design Tools

  • Framer China — Free Framer templates, components, and tutorials (2026).
  • GitHub - lukilabs/beautiful-mermaid — Render Mermaid diagrams as SVG and ASCII art. By Craft team (who also built Craft Agent).
  • GitHub - BIT-DataLab/Edit-Banana — Convert AI-generated images to editable content for PPT/draw.io.

Emerging Technologies

Wireless & Communications

  • Stacked Intelligent Metasurfaces — Stacking multiple RIS (Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces) for light-speed processing, enabling faster communication and sensing. Key author: Jiancheng An. WeChat article (Chinese).

Novel Concepts

  • Frequency-as-Aperture (FaA) — Achieves virtual aperture through frequency variation, adding another degree of freedom beyond physical sensor spacing.
